name: J2EE Bad Practices: Direct Use of Threads
description: The J2EE web application directly creates and manages threads, violating the J2EE standard and introducing risks of deadlocks, race conditions, and synchronization errors that interfere with the container's thread management.
detection_pattern: TRANSFORM node in web application context directly instantiates Thread or implements Runnable without using container-managed STRUCTURAL concurrency utilities (ExecutorService, ManagedExecutorService)
